creator: george@m5p.com
text:
Mark, comment #340: Your help has been substantial, and I hope you will be back to FreeBSD soon.

Andriy, comment #341 and #343:
debug.debugger_on_trap: 0
debug.debugger_on_recursive_panic: 0
debug.debugger_on_panic: 1

Comment #342: It looks like commenting out line 445 would do this?  (The "if" immediately following "case T_DNA" in the /* kernel trap */ branch of the outer "if".)
